title: Home
text:
Advertising researcher · Documentary photographer · Piano player
    Duc ThaiTran.
    Researcher and practitioner in creativity: advertising, photography, music.
    About me
  
  
    
  



  01 About
  An in-progress polymath — documentary and street photographer, piano player, and advertising researcher.
  I study advertising strategy and effectiveness, storytelling, and brand identity. My research focuses on the creative journey in producing ads, how stories are developed, and how to maintain brand identity's clarity throughout the whole process.
  
    See the research →
       
    See personal works →
